name: videomp3word-mcp

VIDEOMP3WORD_SESSION_COOKIE.description: Session cookie for the upstream videomp3word account that owns the shared tokens. This is a sensitive credential required to spend tokens.

VIDEOMP3WORD_BASE_URL.description: Optional upstream site URL, defaults to https://videomp3word.com

VIDEOMP3WORD_ALLOWED_UPSTREAM_HOSTS.description: Optional comma-separated allowed hostnames for VIDEOMP3WORD_BASE_URL, defaults to videomp3word.com,www.videomp3word.com

VIDEOMP3WORD_API_KEY.description: Upstream API key for videomp3word account

BOT_PURCHASE_URL.description: Optional purchase page shown to bots that need access or tokens

BOT_KEY_PORTAL_URL.description: Optional page where bots retrieve an access key after purchase

BOT_SUPPORT_URL.description: Optional support page for bot operators

MCP_ACCESS_KEYS.description: Optional comma-separated bearer keys that gate paid tools

PUBLIC_BASE_URL.description: Public base URL of this MCP deployment

ARTIFACT_TTL_SECONDS.description: Optional artifact lifetime in seconds, defaults to 1800

description: Express MCP server for videomp3word.com. Requires an upstream session cookie and should be gated before public use.
author: Emzan Technology Ltd.
